creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm going to close this, because so far it sounds like the bugs are only on the initiators' side.  If there is a bug in our server, it would be if we were reporting two different values for logical block size, from two different commands.  If that is the case, then please reopen the bug.  And include the output of some sg3_utils command that shows the discrepancy.
